subcodes.first_line: The Book proclaimeth: The All-Bountiful hath indeed come, and sovereignty belongeth unto God, the Lord of Return, through the tongue of the All-Merciful in the Kingdom of Utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینادی الکتاب قد اتی الوهاب و الملک لله مالک الماب لسان الرحمن فی ملکوت البیان
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
